highlights.text: I provided this setup way back on F riday June 20th at 4pm when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
As long as its structurally in tact though, my lean is always to defer to the trend.
As long as bulls defend support though (or quick Failed Breakdown below).

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a quality Failed Breakdowns we had on Thursday evening below 6288 (that produced a 25 point rally), Friday Morning below 6283 (that produced a 35 point rally), then Sunday Evening below 6263 which produced a 56 point rally yesterday.
Patterns like triangles are all well and good, but to actually trade them, we need to use Failed Breakdowns (My core setup).
6271-68 to 6333 = an ascending triangle, with 6285-82 being a magnet inside.

post_title: SPX Tries To Breakout Its Two Week Range, and Fails. What Now? July 16 Plan
